subcodes.first_line: This is a Day whereon the Hour proclaimeth aloud and saith: "O Lord of the Kingdom and the Dominion! I beseech Thee by the power whereby..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا یوم فیه تنادی الساعه و تقول یا اله الملک و الملکوت اسئلک بالقدره التی بها
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @thankfulness; gratitude, @firmness in the Covenant, @prayer for protection, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
